zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz於1130年出生在比利時利包格杜拉斯時，她的父親Othon de Duras de Looz II27歲，母親Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain16歲。她於1144年與Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais在比利時利包格辛特-特盧易登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz于1130年出生在比利时利包格杜拉斯时，她的父亲Othon de Duras de Looz II27岁，母亲Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain16岁。她于1144年与Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais在比利时利包格辛特-特盧易登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: dite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dyte
meanings: English: nickname, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English * dight, a side-form of Middle English dought ‘brave, valiant’, and possibly derived therefore from a shortened form of Old English dyhtig, dohtig ‘doughty’. Compare Doughty .

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz was born in 1130, in Duras, Limburg, Belgium, her father, Othon de Duras de Looz II, was 27 and her mother, Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, was 16. She married Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais in 1144, in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died after 1224, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz est née en 1130, à Duras, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Othon de Duras de Looz II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais en 1144, à Sint-Truiden, Limbourg, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1224, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz 1130 in Duras, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Othon de Duras de Looz II 27 und ihre Mutter Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain 16. Sie hat 1144 in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgien Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1224 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz è nata il nel 1130 nel Duras, Limburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Othon de Duras de Looz II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais nel 1144, nel Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1224, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Loozが1130年にベルギーリンブルグダラスで生まれた時，父Othon de Duras de Looz IIは27歳，母Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchainは16歳であった。1144年にベルギーリンブルグシント-トルイデンでJean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz(이)가 1130년 벨기에 림버그 듀라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Othon de Duras de Looz II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1144년 벨기에 림버그 신트-트루이든에서 Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz nasceu em 1130, em Duras, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Othon de Duras de Looz II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais em 1144, em Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1224, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz родилась в 1130 г. в местности дурас, лимбург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Othon de Duras de Looz II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais в 1144 г. в местности синт-труиден, лимбург, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1224 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz nació en 1130, en Duras, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Othon de Duras de Looz II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Berthe de Ribemont de Bouchain, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais en 1144, en Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1224, en su pueblo.
